description:
The 'ToothGrowth' dataset contains data on guinea pig tooth growth with columns for length ('len'), supplement type ('supp'), and dosage ('dose'). Analyze the effect of dosage on tooth length specifically for the Vitamin C (VC) group. Filter the data to include only 'VC' rows and perform a One-Way ANOVA with 'len' as the Dependent Variable and 'dose' as the Fixed Factor, including homogeneity tests and descriptive statistics. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/VC_Dose_Analysis.jasp. Record the mean tooth length for the 0.5 dose group and the ANOVA p-value in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/vc_means.txt using the following format:

Mean_VC_0.5: [value]
P_value: [value]
